author: doll-agent
content:
Done. The Dimension trait already exposes from_dim_slice as the canonical inverse of as_slice — build_dim_from_shape was reinventing it via Box<dyn Any> downcast against TypeId::of::<D>().

Replaced ~60 lines of Any+downcast machinery with a single trait call: D::from_dim_slice(shape).ok_or_else(|| FerrayError::shape_mismatch(...))

Eliminates the per-load heap allocation and the manual Ix0..Ix6 dispatch table. The NDIM check is preserved for clearer error messages on rank mismatch.

ferray-io: 93 tests pass, clippy clean. Behavior unchanged: same errors for rank mismatch and unsupported types, same successful loads for every previously-supported dimension. -45 lines net. Commit ab80351d.
